architecture.summary: Removing phantom plugin refs from project-detector. plugins field only for installable plugins. type field already captures mobile project types.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal CLI bug fix, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI internals only, no UI

performance.summary: N/A - single root file check only, no recursive scanning

security.summary: N/A - detection logic only, no auth or data handling

edge-cases.summary: build.gradle false positive for Java/Spring projects fixed via fileContains check for com.android. Pure platform keywords map to empty skills/agents.
